detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HOWLMA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (HOWLMA.sol#451-515):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (HOWLMA.sol#499)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (HOWLMA.sol#529-541)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (HOWLMA.sol#505)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (HOWLMA.sol#579)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (HOWLMA.sol#513)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (HOWLMA.sol#667)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (HOWLMA.sol#647)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (HOWLMA.sol#649)
	HOWLMA._rOwned (HOWLMA.sol#253) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOWLMA._takeTeam(uint256) (HOWLMA.sol#661-669)
	- HOWLMA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (HOWLMA.sol#643-657)
	- HOWLMA.balanceOf(address) (HOWLMA.sol#369-373)
	- HOWLMA.constructor() (HOWLMA.sol#319-333)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (HOWLMA.sol#513)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (HOWLMA.sol#675)
	HOWLMA._rTotal (HOWLMA.sol#269) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOWLMA._getCurrentSupply() (HOWLMA.sol#767-777)
	- HOWLMA._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (HOWLMA.sol#673-679)
	- HOWLMA.constructor() (HOWLMA.sol#319-333)
	- HOWLMA.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (HOWLMA.sol#425-433)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HOWLMA.openTrading() (HOWLMA.sol#585-611):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (HOWLMA.sol#595)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HOWLMA.sol#597)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HOWLMA.sol#597)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (HOWLMA.sol#607)
	HOWLMA.tradingOpen (HOWLMA.sol#293) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HOWLMA.openTrading() (HOWLMA.sol#585-611)

Version constraint ^0.8.13 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- StorageWriteRemovalBeforeConditionalTermination
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- InlineAssemblyMemorySideEffects
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.13 (HOWLMA.sol#35)
